creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Boris Korzun from comment #0)

Hmm, the last 2020 release of minio that was in ports was 2020.12.29.23.29.29 and the last release prior to RELEASE.2021-05-11T23-27-41Z that was in ports was 2021.04.06.23.11.00. Then there's this release, 2021.08.25.00.41.18.

I can put a commit message in, but users may not have the release prior to RELEASE.2021-05-11T23-27-41Z available to them. In other words, if you didn't upgrade to at least 2021.04.06.23.11.00 before now, it may be too late. We'd have to make a separate port/package for that release.

And I don't know if anyone really needs it or not. But I'm happy to consider it if you think it's necessary, especially if you have a patch. Copying the version at:

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/www/minio?id=b7c00a63ede070b3cd2569c6af7515bcb1760732

and providing a diff against that would be a good start.
